description_long: This is a multi-tiered, round cake with three distinct layers, each separated by visible bands of cream or frosting. The cake is predominantly purple with alternating white and gold accents, including triangular and circular decorations on the top and sides. The topmost tier is dome-shaped and features a gold peak at its center, surrounded by symmetrical gold shapes. The base of the cake is bordered by a thick gold band, giving it a finished and celebratory appearance. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a fondant or similar icing. The cake sits on a flat, gold-colored plate or tray, elevating it slightly above the surface.
description: A three-tiered, round purple cake with gold and white decorations, topped with a gold peak and displayed on a gold tray.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of gold decorations and the central gold peak on the dome-shaped top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side profile, revealing the layered structure and the gold band at the base.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, with the same gold peak and decorations, emphasizing the cake's symmetry.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the tiered layers and gold accents along the base and top.
